title: Future Builders Center for Training and Community Development Project
description: A cultural and social center offering diverse interactive courses and activities for the local community.
fullDescription: The Future Builders Center is a community-based educational initiative launched in Azaz in 2021, aiming to provide a non-formal learning environment that empowers local residents and displaced populations from different backgrounds. The center offers technological, vocational, cultural, and health-related educational activities tailored to community needs through skill development courses, psychosocial support programs, and community empowerment events within a safe and inclusive environment throughout the year.
importanceList: Empowering youth and women with technological and vocational skills aligned with the labor market.
Promoting digital literacy and health awareness while strengthening psychological and social empowerment.
Supporting individuals who have dropped out of education and expanding accessible learning opportunities for all.
Revitalizing cultural and community engagement and strengthening social participation.
objectives: Supporting thousands of beneficiaries from local residents and displaced communities through learning and community engagement.
Empowering youth and women through specialized vocational programs aligned with labor market needs.
Contributing to rebuilding the social fabric and strengthening community resilience.
Building an effective and sustainable model for a community center that responds to evolving local needs.

components.title: Education and Academic Support:
components.description: Language courses, empowerment programs for graduates, university students, and teachers, as well as a library and reading activities.

components.title: Vocational and Technical Training:
components.description: Programs in computer skills, programming, and various life skills.

components.title: Psychosocial Support and Community Empowerment:
components.description: Individual and group sessions, PSS training, Arabic calligraphy courses, and literacy programs.

components.title: Women Awareness and Empowerment:
components.description: Nursing courses, awareness campaigns, protection programs, and vocational training for women.

components.title: Cultural and Intellectual Activities:
components.description: Lectures, seminars, competitions, and seasonal cultural events.

courses.title: Language Courses
courses.description: Courses in English, Turkish, and Arabic for beginners and advanced learners
courses.details: Designed to develop language skills through interactive methods and practical applications.
courses.sessions: Twice a week (2 hours per session)
goals: Develop communication skills in foreign languages
courses.outcomes: More than 70% of participants became able to communicate in the target language.

courses.title: Computer Skills
courses.description: Basic computer skills, office tools, graphic design, and web development
courses.details: Delivered through a modern practical curriculum covering the latest technologies.
courses.sessions: 3 times per week (2 hours per session)
goals: Prepare youth for the digital job market
courses.outcomes: 65% secured jobs or started their own projects.

courses.title: Arts and Music
courses.description: Courses in drawing, Arabic calligraphy, music, and theater
courses.details: Developing artistic talents and providing a safe space for creativity.
courses.outcomes: 12 exhibitions, 8 theater performances, and 6 music events.

courses.title: Vocational Training
courses.description: Courses in sewing, embroidery, barbering, cooking, and first aid
courses.details: Hands-on training aligned with labor market needs.
goals: Prepare participants for the labor market
courses.outcomes: 55% gained employment or started their own businesses.

courses.title: Life Skills
courses.description: Courses in communication, leadership, project management, and entrepreneurship
courses.details: Practical exercises and applied projects enhancing experiential learning.

courses.title: Literacy and Adult Education
courses.description: Reading, writing, and numeracy courses for adults
courses.details: Tailored teaching methods suitable for adult learners.
goals: Enable adults to read and write
Support parents in following their children's education
courses.outcomes: 85% became able to read and write.

communityEvents.title: Beekeepers Association
communityEvents.details: Awareness and knowledge sessions enhancing community participation.
communityEvents.outcomes: 70% showed improved understanding of modern technologies.

communityEvents.title: Cultural Lectures
communityEvents.description: Knowledge sessions to enhance cultural awareness.
communityEvents.details: Sessions led by specialists in intellectual and cultural fields.
